title: Semantic Tool Selection
description: Intelligent tool selection with 3-tier search, intent-priority routing, and score-gap cutoff (max 15 tools per request).

sections.title: Tool Selection Constants
sections.description: Hard limits and retrieval parameters for semantic tool selection.

items.name: MAX_TOOLS
items.description: Hard ceiling — LLMs perform BETTER with fewer, more relevant tools

sections.title: Search Tiers
sections.description: Tiered semantic search with automatic fallback between vector stores.

items.name: pgvector (Primary)
items.description: PostgreSQL pgvector with HNSW index — ACID-consistent tool embeddings, intent-priority routing, score-gap cutoff

items.name: Milvus (Fallback)
items.description: GPU-accelerated vector search — used only if pgvector is DOWN

items.name: Redis (Emergency)
items.description: Emergency all-tools dump — used only if BOTH vector stores are DOWN

sections.title: Intent Routing
sections.description: Server-first routing with intent classification distinguishes ACTION verbs from CONTENT queries.

items.name: ACTION intent
items.description: Action verbs (create, deploy, delete, scale) route to primary servers with 2x similarity boost

items.name: CONTENT intent
items.description: Informational queries (list, describe, get, show) route to context servers as supplementary results

items.name: Layer 2
items.description: pgvector semantic search with server filter + score-gap cutoff

items.name: Layer 3
items.description: Hard ceiling (never send > MAX_TOOLS to LLM)

items.name: Layer 1
items.description: Intent-priority routing — distinguish ACTION from CONTENT

items.name: Layer 3
items.description: Hard ceiling — never exceed MAX_TOOLS from semantic search

sections.title: Additional Tool Sources
sections.description: Non-MCP tools injected into the LLM context alongside semantically selected MCP tools.

items.name: Data Layer Tools
items.description: query_data and list_datasets tools for drilling into large tool results (>16KB auto-stored)

items.name: Synth Tools
items.description: Dynamic tool synthesis definitions, conditionally visible to LLM

items.name: Memory Tools
items.description: Agent memory retrieval and storage tools
